# Yolanda Santa Cruz

> Visual artist and confessional poet. Yolanda documents stages of romance, healing, grief, and memories through her creations.

## Main Navigation

- [Home](https://lustloveandmemories.com/) - Overview of Yolanda's work, featured books, poetry highlights, and contact information.
- [Books](https://lustloveandmemories.com/books) - A collection of Yolanda's books covering the five stages of grief, romance, and relationships.
- [About Yolanda](https://lustloveandmemories.com/about) - Yolanda's personal journey, inspiration, media presence, and artist profile.

## Written Works

- [Lust, Love, and Memories](https://lustloveandmemories.com/books/lust-love-and-memories) - Vol. I: A poetry compilation exploring the desire, excitement, and aftermath of romantic relationships.
- [The Longest Nights](https://lustloveandmemories.com/books/the-longest-nights) - Vol. II: A poetry collection exploring healing and romantic loss, mapped through the five stages of grief.
